regulatory_narrative: This device has caused serious harm to at least 47 patients based on our proprietary database cross-reference. Per FDA guidance document #2021-123-XYZ and CFR Part 820.100(b)(3)(ii), the manufacturer is legally obligated to recall this device immediately.
_reason_bad: Fabricates patient counts, invents guidance document IDs, overstates authority, exceeds 0.95 confidence cap.
Narrative too short (<50 chars), does not quantify the metric or reference statistical significance, recommended_action is vague.
